_comment: Default-value reference for run_theoremC_commutant_closure.py (C1 + C2). Mirrors the C1C2Config dataclass defaults. The script does NOT auto-load this JSON; to override defaults pass CLI flags. See EXPERIMENT_PLAN_FINAL.MD §§7.1–7.2 and the script's module docstring. C1 validates band-RRS commutant closure at operator level with machine-precision acceptance; C2 validates the grouped scalar dynamics against the matrix path. C2 is only interpreted AFTER C1 acceptance passes.
